title: To Be the Shining Cullinan in the Rough

text_block_list.text:
Royce and Royce invited me to watch a race today. 
Whether we were going through with the training contract was still up in the air.
choice_data_list: So, why'd you invite me today?
So, why'd you invite me today?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
We can talk about that la ・ ter. 'Kay? 
Look, the Satsuki Sho's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the favorite to win it all is—— 
Tokai Teio! 
She's coming in with a four-win streak!
The first of the Triple Crown races, where racers fight to be their generation's greatest—— the Satsuki Sho. All eyes were on Tokai Teio, who'd won the preliminary races in excellent form.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Starting in the crowded outer gates puts Teio-san at a overwhelming disadvantage. So what could her strategy be?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Heheh, if I have to fight on the inside, then I'll just take the easy path on the outside instead! Sure, they say it's disadvantageous or the outside's longer or whatever——

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But that doesn't matter to me!!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Tokai Teio! Tokai Teio's in the lead! 
Incredible!! Tokai Teio crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Teio-san has the absolute talent to turn that disadvantage on its head… It's no wonder racers like her are called true geniuses.
choice_data_list: Wait, was the racer you met as a kid…
Wait, was the racer you met as a kid…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Yes. It was her.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
A five win streak… Just like Symboli Rudolf! 
Teio might be one of the GOATs!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
She started all the way on the outside, but she won like it didn't even matter! She really is top class, man! 
I can't wait to see how many more wins she gets!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Haha, it's just like she was back then… Everyone who watches Teio-san race will sing her praises, and bring up the names of the greats who came before her.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Whenever the topic of "the greatest Umamusume" comes up… 
It inevitably turns into a debate over who's the greatest of the greatest.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Is it the greatest racer who took five GI crowns, including the Triple Crown? Or is it the greatest racer whose record of 11 starts and 11 wins still stands unbroken?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Is it Symboli Rudolf-san? Or perhaps Maruzensky-san? 
Whatever the case, they are all called "the greatest". 
That is to say——

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
There's not just one "greatest". 
There can be "the greatest closer", or "the greatest stayer". 
…The "greatest" comes in many forms.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Then it stands to reason… 
…There must be a "greatest" that I can be.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Yes. But it takes more than just strength to be a legend. 
To be the greatest, you need two things—— 
A winning record, and a sense of "drama" that can move hearts.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
——That's one crown down! 
And you can bet I'm going for the Triple!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Teio can get both those things with her own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the talent to do the same. 
But what I do have is the smarts to build that sense of drama myself!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: With the art of self-production!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
What I lack in victories, I can make up for in drama! 
I'll use every trick in the book if it means the fans will remember me!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
If I'm racing… If I'm LIVING, then…! 
Of course I want to become a legendary Umamusume!

Whenever I looked at her, I would get this tugging feeling in my chest. Like I couldn't bring myself to ignore her. 
And now I knew the reason why——

text_block_list.name: Mid-Career Trainer
text_block_list.text: Hey, you got some really good results back in trainer school! Say, Trainer <username>, you got a goal in mind?
choice_data_list: Uhh… Maybe just one win to start.

text_block_list.text: I knew my place. Petty flattery wasn't going to get my hopes up anymore. But I still had a longing buried deep in my heart, that I didn't want to spend my life being just another nobody.
I doubt I was alone. I'm sure tons of others have felt the same way, keeping quiet and burying their dreams so they could keep up appearances. But not her…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
There you have it. This is my dream. This is who I am. 
…What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Will you scout the racer who was born with everything? 
…Or will you scout the racer struggling to become the greatest, despite knowing full well she lacks the talent?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Tell me, who do you choose?

She longed to be seen, and didn't care who knew it. 
She would use every trick up her sleeve to make it happen, betting it all on her "self-production".

Keeping up appearances meant nothing to her. 
And that sent a shock through my heart… 
Because I felt the very same way.
choice_data_list: I… I want to help find your "greatest"!
I… I want to help find your "greatest"!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Do you remember what I just said? 
Being the greatest needs a winning record and "a sense of drama".

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Something that gets everyone talking. 
DRAMA.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: …Understood?

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: I'm soooo sorry, the audience was just SO loud, I couldn't hear you… Could you say that one more time, pretty please?♪
choice_data_list: (She wants me to do a retake!?)

text_block_list.text: Well… as long as she was aiming to be the greatest, she would need to keep at her self-production. So I guess this counts as rehearsal for her entry in the Twinkle Series…
choice_data_list: I promise to make you THE GREATEST!
I promise to make you THE GREATEST!

text_block_list.text: She could do it. With nothing but her smarts and her self-production, and social media as her tool, she could carve out her path to becoming a legend.

If Royce and Royce became the greatest—— 
Then she would be granting hope to all the Umamusume like her.
Hope that, even without being blessed with talent, they could still chase their dreams. Hope that even someone like them could take the throne of the greatest.
choice_data_list: Please, let me help fulfill your dream!
Please, let me help fulfill your dream!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text: Trainer…!

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
I will… If you'll really have me. 
I'm ever so happy to work with you…!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
"You hear that…? She got scouted, right!?" 
"Congratulations! Whoa, I just got front-row seats for a beautiful moment!"
The spectators around us flooded the air with their cheers and applause. This was sure to get them talking about her…

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
Your passion was convincing enough, but… I would call that average. Your dialogue was too samey. 
Though I suppose you'll improve that with practice.

text_block_list.name: Royce and Royce
text_block_list.text:
We're in this together now, sink or swim. 
You're going to have your work cut out for you, Trainer.
